# Installation
> `npm install --save @types/ember__application`

# Summary
This package contains type definitions for @ember/application (https://emberjs.com/api/ember/4.0/modules/@ember%2Fapplication).

# Details
Files were exported from https://github.com/DefinitelyTyped/DefinitelyTyped/tree/master/types/ember__application.

 * Dependencies: [@types/ember](https://npmjs.com/package/@types/ember), [@types/ember__application](https://npmjs.com/package/@types/ember__application), [@types/ember__engine](https://npmjs.com/package/@types/ember__engine), [@types/ember__object](https://npmjs.com/package/@types/ember__object), [@types/ember__owner](https://npmjs.com/package/@types/ember__owner), [@types/ember__routing](https://npmjs.com/package/@types/ember__routing), [@types/glimmer__component](https://npmjs.com/package/@types/glimmer__component)
 * Global values: none
